mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{account} OR phone = #{account} ORDER BY user_id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.phone, u.user_type, u.auth_status, u.is_verified, uv.real_name, uv.id_card_number, uv.id_card_front_url, uv.id_card_back_url, uv.verification_status, uv.reject_reason, uv.reviewer_id, uv.reviewed_time, uv.created_time, uv.updated_time FROM users u LEFT JOIN users_verfications uv ON u.user_id = uv.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT uv.verification_id, uv.user_id, u.username, u.phone, u.user_type, u.auth_status, u.is_verified, uv.real_name, uv.id_card_number, uv.id_card_front_url, uv.id_card_back_url, uv.verification_status, uv.reject_reason, uv.reviewer_id, uv.reviewed_time, uv.created_time, uv.updated_time FROM users_verfications uv LEFT JOIN users u ON uv.user_id = u.user_id WHERE uv.verification_id = #{verificationId} LIMIT 1

SELECT uv.verification_id, uv.user_id, u.username, u.phone, u.user_type, u.auth_status, u.is_verified, uv.real_name, uv.id_card_number, uv.id_card_front_url, uv.id_card_back_url, uv.verification_status, uv.reject_reason, uv.reviewer_id, uv.reviewed_time, uv.created_time, uv.updated_time FROM users_verfications uv LEFT JOIN users u ON uv.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY uv.created_time DESC, uv.verification_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, phone, email, avatar_url, user_type, admin_role, status, is_verified, auth_status, region) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{userType}, #{adminRole}, #{status}, #{isVerified}, #{authStatus}, #{region})

INSERT INTO users_verfications (user_id, real_name, id_card_number, id_card_front_url, id_card_back_url, verification_status, reject_reason, reviewer_id, reviewed_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{realName}, #{idCardNumber}, #{idCardFrontUrl}, #{idCardBackUrl}, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE real_name = VALUES(real_name), id_card_number = VALUES(id_card_number), id_card_front_url = VALUES(id_card_front_url), id_card_back_url = VALUES(id_card_back_url), verification_status = 0, reject_reason = NULL, reviewer_id = NULL, reviewed_time = NULL, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, cancel_requested_at = #{cancelRequestedAt}, cancel_effective_at = #{cancelEffectiveAt}, cancel_cooling_days = #{cancelCoolingDays}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = 1, cancel_requested_at = NULL, cancel_effective_at = NULL, cancel_cooling_days = NULL, updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET is_verified = #{isVerified}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE users
username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash},
phone = #{phone}, phone = NULL,
email = #{email}, email = NULL,
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
region = #{region}, region = NULL,
user_type = #{userType}, admin_role = #{adminRole}, status = #{status}, is_verified = #{isVerified}, auth_status = #{authStatus}, cancel_requested_at = #{cancelRequestedAt}, cancel_effective_at = #{cancelEffectiveAt}, cancel_cooling_days = #{cancelCoolingDays}, updated_time = NOW()
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users_verfications SET verification_status = 1, reject_reason = NULL, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE verification_id = #{verificationId}

UPDATE users_verfications SET verification_status = 2, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_time = NOW(), updated_time = NOW() WHERE verification_id = #{verificationId}
